hero.subtitle: I help teams ship better products faster with strong frontend execution and delivery leadership.

about.title: Product-Minded Engineer With Delivery DNA
about.description: I combine hands-on frontend engineering with Agile delivery leadership. My edge is bridging product, design, and engineering to deliver high-quality outcomes without losing momentum.
highlights: Strong React, Next.js, and TypeScript foundation with practical SaaS delivery experience.
Proven Scrum leadership: facilitation, planning, retrospectives, and steady execution.
Business ownership mindset from entrepreneurship and end-to-end client delivery.

items.label: 100% sprint goal completion
items.description: Led a 5-person cross-functional team with consistent delivery discipline.

items.label: team efficiency uplift
items.description: Improved predictability and flow through process and impediment optimization.

items.label: client retention
items.description: Built long-term relationships and reliable value delivery as founder.

roles.title: Frontend Developer / Scrum Master
roles.summary: Led Agile delivery and supported frontend development for a production SaaS platform.
achievements: Owned delivery rituals and execution quality across planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives.
Improved team velocity and delivery predictability through workflow optimization.
Drove stakeholder demos, faster feedback loops, and decision clarity.
Coordinated bug resolution and production issue follow-up to improve platform stability.

roles.title: Owner & Founder
roles.summary: Built and managed a business end-to-end: strategy, sales, operations, and client relationships.
achievements: Delivered consistent year-over-year revenue growth through focused execution.
Maintained high retention through service quality and relationship management.
Optimized operational workflows for better scheduling and cost control.

skills.title: Core Skills
certifications: CSS - The Complete Guide (Flexbox, Grid, Sass)

items.title: SaaS Delivery Leadership
items.description: Combined Scrum leadership and frontend collaboration to keep delivery stable, predictable, and aligned with business priorities.

items.title: Workflow & Velocity Optimization
items.description: Introduced process improvements and impediment removal routines that lifted team efficiency and planning confidence.

items.title: Stakeholder Feedback Engine
items.description: Established regular demos and tighter feedback loops to speed up decision-making and reduce delivery risk.
